# terrible_cisco_dnac_accesspoint_workflow_manager (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (String) List of details of AP being managed.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `config_verify` (Boolean) Indicates whether configuration verification is enabled. This flag is always set to false. As a result, some field changes may not exhibit idempotent behavior due to Access Point reboots.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `dnac_api_task_timeout` (Number) The number of times to retry resynchronization.
- `dnac_task_poll_interval` (Number) The interval, in seconds, for polling Cisco Catalyst Center.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `next_task_after_interval` (Number) Time in seconds between Provision and AP updated execution
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) The desired state of the device replacement workflow.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `response_1` (String) A list of dictionaries containing details about the AP updates and verification results, as returned by the Catalyst Center Python SDK
- `response_2` (String) A dictionary with provision status returned by the Catalyst Center Python SDK
- `response_3` (String) A dictionary with reboot status of AP returned by the Catalyst Center Python SDK
- `response_4` (String) A dictionary with bulk update status of AP returned by the Catalyst Center Python SDK
- `response_5` (String) A dictionary with factory reset status of AP returned by the Catalyst Center Python SDK
